description_long: This is a modern, twin-engine military jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a sharply pointed nose. The wings are delta-shaped and set low on the fuselage, featuring multiple hardpoints for external stores or armaments. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a tinted, bubble-style canopy, providing wide visibility for the pilot. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, with prominent exhaust nozzles visible. The overall surface is smooth and metallic, with minimal visible markings or color variation.
description: A sleek, twin-engine military jet with a delta wing, forward bubble canopy, and conventional tail. The surface is smooth and metallic, with a streamlined, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and wide delta wings with visible hardpoints.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low-mounted delta wing, forward cockpit, and rear engine placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying twin engine exhausts, single vertical stabilizer, and the full span of the delta wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same low delta wing, cockpit, and tail configuration as view 1.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-mounted delta wing with moderate sweep and multiple hardpoints; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear; main and nose gear units are implied but not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy.
